news.headline: Pi Network refutes scam claims by Bybit CEO, cites Chinese police report targeting impersonators.
news.summary: Pi Network informed Cointelegraph that a recent Chinese police report was targeting individuals impersonating the project. The report aimed at cracking down on bad actors who were pretending to be associated with Pi Network.

news.headline: Virtuals Protocol's revenue drops by 97% amid fading AI agent demand, as platform performance diminishes.
news.summary: Virtuals Protocol, a platform for AI agents, has experienced a drop in popularity and a decline in performance metrics. The platform's usage has decreased significantly, resulting in a decrease in overall performance.

Sweden's first hybrid solar park powered by Sungrow in Halmstad, a major step towards sustainable energy future.
news.summary: In Halmstad, Sweden, on February 28, 2025, a significant development took place with the successful deployment of one of the country's initial hybrid solar parks. This marks a pivotal moment in advancing towards a more sustainable and resilient energy landscape. Sungrow, a renowned global provider of renewable energy solutions, played a key role in bringing this project to fruition.

news.headline: Sushui Tech to unveil methanol fuel cell series at BAPCO 2025 in UK, Booth No.: B19, March 5th-6th.
news.summary: Sushui Energy Technology, also known as Sushui Tech, will display its lineup of direct methanol fuel cell products at the upcoming British Association of Public Safety Communications Officials Annual Event in Coventry on March 5th and 6th. The event will take place at Booth No. B19. This showcase of Sushui Tech's products serves as a platform to highlight their innovative fuel cell technology during this event, which is expected to attract a significant number of industry professionals and attendees interested in public safety communications.

news.headline: Global Gearbox & Gear Motors Market valued at $15.3B in 2023, expected to reach $23.4B by 2034 with a 4.0% CAGR, driven by industrial and automotive demand. Numerous key players innovating in the sector., with emerging start-ups disrupting the market. Key drivers include industrial automation, renewable energy growth, infrastructure development, automotive industry expansion, and growing demand for energy-efficient solutions. Market developments focus on technological advancements, sustainability initiatives, mergers & acquisitions, and expansion in emerging markets, with integration of IoT and AI.
news.summary: The global Gearbox & Gear Motors industry was valued at US$15.3 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.0% from 2024 to 2034. The market is projected to reach US$23.4 billion by 2034, driven by factors such as industrial automation, advancements in power transmission technology, and increased demand in automotive, wind energy, and manufacturing sectors. Key players in the market include Siemens AG, SEW-Eurodrive, and ABB Group. Start-ups like NanoGearTech and RevoDrive are introducing innovative technologies in the field. Market drivers include industrial automation, renewable energy growth, infrastructure development, the expansion of the automotive industry, and the demand for energy-efficient solutions. Companies are focusing on technological advancements, sustainability initiatives, mergers & acquisitions, and expanding into emerging markets like Asia-Pacific. Integration with IoT and AI technologies is also a key development in the industry.

news.headline: Hinen partners with SED Group at Solar & Storage Live Africa 2025 in Johannesburg from March 25-27, 2025.
news.summary: The upcoming Solar & Storage Live Africa 2025 event, scheduled from March 25 to 27 in Johannesburg, is poised to be Africa's premier renewable energy exhibition. This event will gather key players, including industry leaders, experts, and policymakers, to delve into clean energy solutions. With the promise of being the largest and most influential of its kind in Africa, the event is expected to draw substantial global attention.

news.headline: Finnish company Flextra joins Elydan Group, specializing in geothermal systems, aims to boost presence in Finland and Baltic countries with over €3 million in revenue.
news.summary: Flextra, a company based in PORI, Finland, known for its expertise in geothermal systems and hot water distribution in buildings using pre-insulated flexible systems, has merged with Elydan Group, a mid-sized European enterprise specializing in fluid distribution and management systems. This collaboration aims to enhance Elydan Group's footprint in Finland and the Baltic countries by offering additional product lines that cater to the specific needs of the Nordic market. The partnership is anticipated to result in a revenue exceeding €3 million.

news.headline: Netflix to surpass YouTube in video revenue by 2025 according to Omdia, with Netflix projecting $46.2B and YouTube at $45.6B.
news.summary: In 2025, Netflix is projected to surpass YouTube for the first time in total video revenue. Exclusive Omdia research revealed at MIP TV London 2025 indicates that in 2024, YouTube led the market with $42.5 billion in revenue, while Netflix earned $39.2 billion. However, forecasts for 2025 show Netflix taking the lead with $46.2 billion, with $43.2 billion coming from subscriptions and $3.2 billion from advertising. Meanwhile, YouTube is expected to generate $45.6 billion in revenue.

news.headline: Ecrio partners with Intel and Canonical for AI-powered communication solutions. CUPERTINO, Calif., Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: Ecrio Inc., a prominent provider of AI-driven communication solutions, has recently formed a valuable partnership with industry giants Intel Corporation and Canonical. The collaboration, unveiled on February 28, 2025, aims to deliver cutting-edge critical communication solutions. This strategic alliance between Ecrio, Intel, and Canonical signifies a significant step towards unleashing the power of AI in enhancing communication systems. This collaboration is expected to revolutionize critical communication technologies by leveraging AI capabilities. The partnership is set to bring forth enhanced solutions to the market, combining Ecrio’s expertise in AI-driven communication with Intel's technological prowess. This collaboration is poised to make a substantial impact in the industry, promising advanced and innovative communication solutions in the near future.

news.headline: transcosmos & HIS launch "Singapore Freeze Tag" game on Roblox offering players a chance to win a trip to Singapore.
news.summary: Tourists visiting well-known destinations can now participate in Freeze Tag and have the chance to earn a free trip to Singapore. Recently on February 28, 2025, transcosmos revealed their collaboration with prominent travel agency HIS to introduce a fresh game titled "Singapore Freeze Tag" on Roblox. This game allows players to engage in Freeze Tag at various tourist spots and potentially secure a complimentary journey to Singapore.

news.headline: Hong Kong invests $125M in AI, enhances Cyberport's supercomputing prowess for AI and Web3 research, and blockchain development.
news.summary: Cyberport in Hong Kong has secured a substantial $125 million investment to enhance its research initiatives in the fields of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Web3 technologies. This funding injection will significantly bolster Cyberport's efforts towards advancing blockchain development and fostering talents in the realm of AI.

news.headline: SONGMICS HOME launches S-HOME Initiative, assisting 20 million families globally with social care and support.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Los Angeles, a well-known online furniture brand, SONGMICS HOME, revealed its dedication to social responsibility through the S-HOME Initiative. This initiative aims to make a positive difference through global welfare efforts. SONGMICS HOME, which caters to 20 million households worldwide, is taking steps to incorporate these principles within its operations.

Mibro launches new OpenEar Pro, lighter fit with better sound for active lifestyles; part of ZhenShi IT.
news.summary: Shenzhen, China-based ZhenShi Information Technology unveiled the Mibro OpenEar Pro on February 28, 2025. This cutting-edge audio technology marks a major advancement in user comfort. Under the brand Mibro, the company introduced their latest innovation, aimed at enhancing the fitness experience.

Geotab launches Driver Risk Insights and Work Order Management at Geotab Connect 2025 to enhance fleet safety and maintenance.
news.summary: New products called 'Driver Risk Insights' and 'Work Order Management' were introduced at the Geotab Connect 2025 event. These innovations are designed to assist fleet managers in taking proactive measures to enhance vehicle safety and maintenance. 'Driver Risk Insights' offers increased visibility into risk factors, aiming to minimize accidents and decrease expenses. The launch aims to aid in better management of fleet operations and ensure enhanced safety measures.

NTG Nordic Transport Group A/S will hold its 2024 Annual Report Conference Call.
Construction contract signed for Rail Baltica Selja-Tootsi section involving 14.5km of railway, structures, 2.5m cu meters earthwork, costing 62.3M euros, to finish by 2028.
news.summary: A construction contract has been signed between Tariston AS, a group company of AS Nordecon, and OÜ Rail Baltic Estonia for the initial phase of railway infrastructure construction on the Rail Baltica main route in Pärnu County. This phase will focus on the Selja-Tootsi section, encompassing the construction of 14.5 kilometers of railway embankment and six structures, including three ecoducts, two viaducts, and a pedestrian and bicycle tunnel. The project will involve moving approximately 2.5 million cubic meters of earth in total. The contract is valued at 62.3 million euros, plus VAT, with a completion deadline set for the conclusion of 2028.
